hooks.command: if [ -f .harness/sprint-state.json ]; then cat .harness/sprint-state.json; elif [ -f .harness/progress.md ]; then cat .harness/progress.md; fi
if [ -d .harness ]; then bash -c 'echo "## Session $(date -Iseconds)" >> .harness/progress.md && echo "Stopped. Current sprint state should be committed." >> .harness/progress.md'; fi

if [ -d .harness ] && [ -f .harness/sprint-state.json ]; then bash -c 'LATEST=$(ls -t .harness/evals/sprint-*-r*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$LATEST" ]; then STAMP=$(date -Iseconds); python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); d[\"last_updated\"]=sys.argv[2]; json.dump(d,open(sys.argv[1],\"w\"),indent=2)" .harness/sprint-state.json "$STAMP" 2>/dev/null || true; fi'; fi
